PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-04-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Kelly Dixon appearing for petitioner. Proof of publication in Houston presented. Court is granting the petition for removal but not including the accounting. Order signed. Bond issue addressed. Counsel was told that it will take six months to recover the escheat property. Bond is fixed in the amount of $10,000.00 at this time. Order signed. Status on administration is set on 8/6. No appearance if report is filed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.

Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Continued To Apr-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kelly Dixon appearing for petitioner. Counsel has not been able to locate Mr. Wu. Court is granting her request to allow service of the citation by publication. Order signed. Matter is continued to 4/4.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.
